languages.text: "Отказ". {n}Слово, брошенное Эоганном, звучит с нетипичным для него лязгом.{/n} "В лабораторных условиях я бы решился на подобную коммуникацию, но сейчас Нунциус настоятельно советует не принимать на себя риск информационного заражения. Я согласен с его советом, и предлагаю всем последовать таковому".

"No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."
languages.original_text: "Отказ". {n}Слово, брошенное Эоганном, звучит с нетипичным для него лязгом.{/n} "В лабораторных условиях я бы решился на подобную коммуникацию, но сейчас Нунциус настоятельно советует не принимать на себя риск информационного заражения. Я согласен с его советом, и предлагаю всем последовать таковому".

I align with his judgment and propose that everyone do the same."

I align with his judgment and propose that everyone do the same."

languages.text: «No». {n}La palabra solitaria de Eogunn resuena con un retumbar metálico impropio de su voz.{/n} «Bajo condiciones controladas de laboratorio, me atrevería a realizar esta comunicación, pero, ahora mismo, Nuncius se opone insistentemente al riesgo de la contaminación de datos. Coincido con su juicio y propongo que todos hagan lo mismo».
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: «No». {n}La palabra solitaria de Eogunn resuena con un retumbar metálico impropio de su voz.{/n} «Bajo condiciones controladas de laboratorio, me atrevería a realizar esta comunicación, pero, ahora mismo, Nuncius se opone insistentemente al riesgo de la contaminación de datos. Coincido con su juicio y propongo que todos hagan lo mismo».

languages.text: “不。”{n}伊奥贡吐出的这个字带着金属的铿锵声，与他平时的声音截然不同。{/n}“若是在受控的实验环境下，我会冒险进行这种通讯，但此刻，努恩修斯强烈建议，不要冒数据被污染的风险。我认同他的判断，并提议所有人都照做。”
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: “不。”{n}伊奥贡吐出的这个字带着金属的铿锵声，与他平时的声音截然不同。{/n}“若是在受控的实验环境下，我会冒险进行这种通讯，但此刻，努恩修斯强烈建议，不要冒数据被污染的风险。我认同他的判断，并提议所有人都照做。”

languages.text: "Nein." {n}Dieses eine Wort von Eogunn hallt mit einem metallischen Klang wider, der für seine Stimme gänzlich untypisch ist.{/n} "Unter kontrollierten Laborbedingungen würde ich mich auf eine derartige Kommunikation einlassen, aber im Moment rät Nuncius dringend davon ab, das Risiko einer Datenkontaminierung einzugehen. Ich schließe mich seiner Einschätzung an und rate das auch allen anderen."
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: "Nein." {n}Dieses eine Wort von Eogunn hallt mit einem metallischen Klang wider, der für seine Stimme gänzlich untypisch ist.{/n} "Unter kontrollierten Laborbedingungen würde ich mich auf eine derartige Kommunikation einlassen, aber im Moment rät Nuncius dringend davon ab, das Risiko einer Datenkontaminierung einzugehen. Ich schließe mich seiner Einschätzung an und rate das auch allen anderen."

languages.text: « Non. » {n}Le seul mot que prononce Eogunn prend des accents métalliques qui ne ressemblent en rien à sa voix habituelle.{/n} « Dans l'environnement contrôlé d'un laboratoire, je me risquerais volontiers à une telle communication, mais pour l'heure, Nuncius déconseille vivement de nous exposer à une éventuelle contamination des données. Je suis d'accord avec lui et je suggère que nous adoptions tous cette ligne de conduite. »
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: « Non. » {n}Le seul mot que prononce Eogunn prend des accents métalliques qui ne ressemblent en rien à sa voix habituelle.{/n} « Dans l'environnement contrôlé d'un laboratoire, je me risquerais volontiers à une telle communication, mais pour l'heure, Nuncius déconseille vivement de nous exposer à une éventuelle contamination des données. Je suis d'accord avec lui et je suggère que nous adoptions tous cette ligne de conduite. »

languages.text: "Hayır." {n}Eogunn'un ağzından dökülen bu tek kelime, sesinin doğasına hiç uymayan metalik bir çınlamayla yankılanıyor.{/n} "Kontrollü laboratuvar koşulları altında böyle bir iletişime girmeye cesaret edebilirdim ancak şu anda Nuncius, veri kirliliği riskini üstlenmememizi şiddetle tavsiye ediyor. Onun bu kararına katılıyor ve herkesin aynı şeyi yapmasını öneriyorum."
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır." {n}Eogunn'un ağzından dökülen bu tek kelime, sesinin doğasına hiç uymayan metalik bir çınlamayla yankılanıyor.{/n} "Kontrollü laboratuvar koşulları altında böyle bir iletişime girmeye cesaret edebilirdim ancak şu anda Nuncius, veri kirliliği riskini üstlenmememizi şiddetle tavsiye ediyor. Onun bu kararına katılıyor ve herkesin aynı şeyi yapmasını öneriyorum."

languages.text: 「いいえ。」{n}エオグンの口から発せられたその一言は、彼の声とは思えない金属的な響きを帯びていた。{/n}「制御された実験室環境下であれば、私はそのようなコミュニケーションを試みるだろうが、現時点ではヌンシウスはデータ汚染のリスクを冒すことを強く勧告している。私は彼の判断に賛成し、皆も同様の判断をすることを提案する。」
languages.original_text: "No." {n}The single word uttered by Eogunn rings with a metallic clang entirely uncharacteristic of his voice.{/n} "Under controlled laboratory conditions, I would venture into such communication, but presently Nuncius strongly advises against assuming the risk of data contamination. I align with his judgement and propose that everyone do the same."

traits.locale_text: 「いいえ。」{n}エオグンの口から発せられたその一言は、彼の声とは思えない金属的な響きを帯びていた。{/n}「制御された実験室環境下であれば、私はそのようなコミュニケーションを試みるだろうが、現時点ではヌンシウスはデータ汚染のリスクを冒すことを強く勧告している。私は彼の判断に賛成し、皆も同様の判断をすることを提案する。」
